title: AAMEN Light-Up Basketball Shootout Game for Kids & Adults, 2 Player Head-to-Head Hoops with Movable Launchers, Score Counters & Net Court Walls
features: Challenge friends or family in fast-paced basketball shootouts with twin hoops and individual movable launchers designed for precision aiming and competitive fun that keeps everyone engaged for hours.

Celebrate every successful shot with vibrant illuminated baskets that enhance excitement during gameplay—perfect for dim rooms, parties, game nights, or late-night competitions to boost adrenaline and engagement.

Stay locked in the competition with dual manual score counters that encourage focus, sportsmanship, and friendly rivalry while developing math skills and strategic thinking during each thrilling round of play.
Never chase runaway balls again! The 4-sided net court walls keep gameplay tidy and focused, while four included mini basketballs ensure non-stop action without interruptions or lost equipment.

Ideal as a birthday surprise, holiday gift, classroom reward, or office desk stress-reliever; promotes hand-eye coordination, quick reflexes, social bonding, and screen-free entertainment for kids, teens, and adults alike.
description: Product description Bring the Games Home Transform any tabletop into a buzzing basketball arena with this electrifying Light-Up LED Basketball Shoot-Out Game! Designed for two players, it delivers head-to-head competition with dazzling illuminated backboards that flash with every basket scored—creating an immersive, high-energy experience perfect for living rooms, dorms, offices, or party centers. Engineered for Nonstop Fun Equipped with dual movable launchers, you can aim, adjust, and fire with pinpoint accuracy. Four mini basketballs ensure rapid-fire gameplay, while the surrounding net court walls prevent stray shots and keep the action contained—no more chasing balls under the couch! Build Skills Through Play More than just a game—it’s a developmental tool that sharpens hand-eye coordination, encourages healthy competition, and fosters social interaction. Manual score counters add a layer of strategy and accountability, making every point count. Specifications Dimensions: Compact tabletop design (fits desks, tables, countertops) Includes: 4 mini basketballs, 2 movable launchers, 2 manual score counters Power: LED lights powered by batteries Recommended Age: 5 years and up Material: Durable plastic frame with fabric net walls Setup: Quick assembly, no tools required Safety Warning Warning. Not suitable for children under five years.
